intent: E119-S13 final story: annual review checklist, ICO SME self-assessment, compliance README, CURRENT_NOTICE_VERSION bump to 2026-05-01.1, ack-rate-report CLI script, and E2E test coverage for beta re-ack and full compliance lifecycle.

findings.title: process.exit() inside library functions (fetchAckedUserIds, fetchAllAuthUserIds)
findings.suggested_fix: Throw an Error instead of process.exit(1) in utility functions; handle process.exit at the top level. Not urgent for a read-only CLI script.
findings.why_it_matters: Calling process.exit from utility functions makes future testing impossible and is non-idiomatic. Low risk for a manual reporting tool but sets a bad pattern.

findings.title: Hard wait (waitForTimeout 500ms) without justification comment in dismiss test
findings.suggested_fix: Add // waitForTimeout-ok: no-POST assertion requires time for any async POSTs to fire comment. Or use page.waitForResponse with .catch(() => {}) to explicitly confirm no POST fires.
findings.why_it_matters: ESLint test-patterns/no-hard-waits flags this. The wait is justified but needs a comment to suppress the warning cleanly.
evidence: Line ~340: await page.waitForTimeout(500) without justification comment

findings.title: Supabase storage key discovery not documented in docs/solutions/
findings.suggested_fix: Add a docs/solutions/ entry documenting that the Supabase JS client uses sb-{hostname.split('.')[0]}-auth-token (not sb-knowlune-auth-token) as the storage key. Future test authors will hit this.
findings.why_it_matters: This was a significant debugging discovery (30+ min). Without documentation, the next test author will hit the same 429 loop. The commit message is ephemeral; docs/solutions/ is durable.
evidence: Commit: 'Supabase JS client uses sb-supabase-auth-token (hostname-based) not sb-knowlune-auth-token'
Existing tests in notice-acknowledgement.spec.ts use the wrong key and are broken by the same bug

residualRisks: fetchAllAuthUserIds has no max-page safety guard; safe for beta scale but could loop forever on large tenants
Existing notice-acknowledgement.spec.ts tests remain broken (429 errors) — pre-existing issue, not introduced by this PR
testingGaps: ack-rate-report.ts has no unit tests — intentionally deferred per plan (manual CLI verification)
learnings: Supabase JS v2 storage key = sb-{URL hostname split('.')[0]}-auth-token, not sb-{projectRef}. For supabase.pedrolages.net → sb-supabase-auth-token
Session expires_at must use far-future value (2099) when page.clock advances to 2026+
Account deletion uses JWT iat for sessionRequiresReauth; test tokens need valid iat claim
page.context().route() with regex intercepts Supabase auth; page.route() glob patterns miss some URLs
